title: cyanocephalus caprariifolius
intro: Cyanocephalus caprariifolius, also known as the "Blue Headed Thistle", is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, but due to a lack of research, its use should be approached with caution.
